# Numeric Inequality

Numeric inequality comparison

```perl
$not_equal = $a != $b;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$not_equal = $a != $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$not_equal = $a != $b;
```
